case_title: DIRECT MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC. VS. AMERICAN RATINGS CORPORATION

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIRECT MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMERICAN RATINGS CORPORATION $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,090.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-11-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY GLENN CHASE--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ERIN BLEAU--SENIOR STAFF ACCOUNTANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY DIRECT MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN RATINGS CORPORATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIRECT MARKETING SOLUTIONS, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 40.00 - SERVED JUN-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN RATINGS CORPORATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AMERICAN RATINGS CORPORATION
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-11-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT AMERICAN RATINGS CORPORATION
